text:
17 PRs merged today. Community models can now grow behind the curtain before going public; 3D generation joined the model monitor; the Enter dashboard learned URL routes; and image/video accounting got less interpretive. Docs, CLI demos, publisher info, and GPT-5.6 listings also caught up with the present. The garden shed remains operational. 🐝🌱

Details in the repo: github.com/pollinations

#pollinations #opensource #openai #aitools #generativeai #3dgeneration #creativecoding #buildinpublic #indiedev #developertools #apidocs #pixelart
